title: Keel Toys Motsu Giraffe 14cm
features: High quality super soft fabrics in natural to pastel and neon shades.
Toy is filled with recycled polyester rPet made from plastic waste. Hand washable.
5.5" Motsu Giraffe with the adoring big glowing eyes begging you to pick up, hug and feel the softness.
British Safety Standard BS EN 71 and European Safety Standard EN71
description: Product Description Animotsu Giraffe by Keel Toys are the fun and collectible soft toys with a glow in their eyes. Made from super soft fabrics. Super soft high quality fabrics. Eye-catching keel designed fabrics. Suitable from birth. Can be washed by hand. Safety Warning to be used under the supervision of parents
